arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah reaction exposes Liverpool reality as new transfer fight about to start
arts.sum: Analysis from Anfield as Liverpool hammer West Ham United 5-1 in the Carabao Cup

arts.ttl: West Ham manager Julen Lopetegui fumes at Liverpool goal decision amid VAR confusion
arts.sum: Liverpool were resounding winners in their Carabao Cup third round tie against Premier League opposition on Wednesday night - but the West Ham United manager was not happy.

arts.ttl: Liverpool blamed for Trent Alexander-Arnold uncertainty as Real Madrid theory emerges
arts.sum: Former Liverpool defender Glen Johnson was asked about what winning trophies at Real Madrid could mean for Trent Alexander-Arnold and how Reds fans would react if he left

arts.ttl: Liverpool 5-1 West Ham: Player ratings as Jota and Gakpo see off 10-man Hammers
arts.sum: LM: Cody Gakpo - 9/10 - Rarely gave the ball away and was a helpful outlet for Liverpool as they looked to stretch West Ham's defence. A Jarell Quansah own goal had seen the visitors lead early doors, but the game was turned on its head by Diogo Jota goals either side of half-time.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot shares honest Federico Chiesa verdict after full Liverpool debut
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa made his full Liverpool debut in Wednesday night's 5-1 thrashing of West Ham United

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed Kylian Mbappe update as Real Madrid star faces race to return from injury
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to face off with Spanish giants Real Madrid in the Champions League later this season and look set to entertain French forward Kylian Mbappe despite a recent injury blow

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds among clubs 'given boost' in Joshua Kimmich pursuit
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly among the clubs who have been given a boost in their pursuit to sign Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich.

arts.ttl: Julen Lopetegui leaves Anfield on crutches after injuring his calf in frustration during West Ham's dismal 5-1 defeat against Liverpool in the Carabao Cup
arts.sum: West Ham manager Julen Lopetegui was left needing crutches after injuring his calf while letting off steam in the Anfield dugout during West Ham's 5-1 Carabao Cup thrashing against Liverpool.

arts.ttl: West Ham boss Julen Lopetegui injures calf in frustration during Liverpool loss
arts.sum: Lopetegui limped into the room for his post-match press conference following a heavy Hammers defeat in the Carabao Cup at Anfield.

arts.ttl: EFL Cup fourth-round draw: Liverpool, Man City to head on the road for tricky ties
arts.sum: Holders Liverpool and eight-time winners Manchester City have been given tricky away ties for the fourth round of the EFL Cup.
